get.summary: Test endpoint to verify Sentry integration.
get.description:
This endpoint intentionally raises an exception to test error tracking.
Use it to verify that errors are being sent to Sentry correctly.

Only available in development environment.

Example:
    GET /sentry-debug

Raises:
    HTTPException: Always raises a 500 error for testing

ApiKeyAuth.description: API key required for all authenticated routes.
ApiKeyAuth.name: X-Api-Key
